tooltip.corpse_campus.dominance_crouch_c: Crouch and aim at a mob to bind it under your dominance
tooltip.corpse_campus.dominance_open_lis: Cast normally to open the player list and assign a focus target
tooltip.corpse_campus.dominance_death_li: If all dominated mobs die, you die as well
tooltip.corpse_campus.daiyue_path_attack: Dash forward rapidly and strike each enemy once along the path
tooltip.corpse_campus.daiyue_sword_wave: Casting produces particles, wet slicing audio, and a visible sword wave trail
tooltip.corpse_campus.last_stand: Last stand: stay at 1 HP and gain %s s immunity
tooltip.corpse_campus.necrotic_rebirth_r: If active when you die, you revive immediately as an undead husk
tooltip.corpse_campus.necrotic_rebirth_k: While undead, only kills can restore health. Heal per kill: %s
tooltip.corpse_campus.executioner_damage: Each slash deals %s%% of blade damage
tooltip.corpse_campus.executioner_hold_c: Hold to keep releasing slashes; each trigger also spends mana
tooltip.corpse_campus.executioner_crouch: While crouching, slashes continuously form at the aimed point
tooltip.corpse_campus.mania_forces_front: Rushes and attacks targets in front of you, with every hit showing crit impact
tooltip.corpse_campus.toggle_cast: Cast again to turn it off
tooltip.corpse_campus.hold_cast: Hold the cast to keep control
tooltip.corpse_campus.release_throw: Release the cast to launch the target
tooltip.corpse_campus.sonic_mode: Darkens your vision and marks all creatures in range with wall-piercing sonic icons
tooltip.corpse_campus.sonic_mute_radius: Silences all sound within %s blocks around you
tooltip.corpse_campus.danger_mode: Continuously senses enemies that lock onto you and warns their direction
tooltip.corpse_campus.olfaction_silence_: Silences all sound within %s blocks around you
tooltip.corpse_campus.olfaction_low_heal: Reveals red tracks from entities below %s%% health
tooltip.corpse_campus.olfaction_speed_bo: Following those tracks grants Speed II
tooltip.corpse_campus.elementalist_rando: All creatures inside the domain are repeatedly struck by random tier-1 fire, water, or lightning attacks
tooltip.corpse_campus.elementalist_crouc: Cast while crouching to create a closed barrier with a full shell
tooltip.corpse_campus.recorder_officer_r: Requires paper in your main hand; crouch to record, cast normally to attach it to a target
Cast while crouching at a block to write that location onto the paper
tooltip.corpse_campus.recorder_officer_a: Cast at a creature to set a countdown; when it ends, the target is teleported to the recorded spot
tooltip.corpse_campus.midas_touch_target: Turns your held item and the aimed block into bombs
tooltip.corpse_campus.midas_touch_max_po: Maximum blast level consumes a massive %s mana
tooltip.corpse_campus.midas_touch_remote: Bomb blocks explode when interacted with, and bomb items explode when right-clicked
tooltip.corpse_campus.midas_touch_invent: Bomb items still detonate when the timer expires inside inventories
tooltip.corpse_campus.healing_target_pla: Aim at another player to grant them Regeneration I
tooltip.corpse_campus.healing_self_fallb: If no player is targeted, the healing falls back to yourself
tooltip.corpse_campus.stamina_speed_boos: Gain a speed boost for the full duration, making pursuit and disengage easier
tooltip.corpse_campus.stamina_hunger_eff: Periodically offsets hunger loss during the buff, easing long stretches of movement
tooltip.corpse_campus.stamina_durability: All damageable items consume 50% less durability while the buff is active
message.corpse_campus.elementalist_no_ma: Not enough mana. The elemental domain collapses
message.corpse_campus.recorder_officer_n: Recorder Officer requires paper in your main hand
Aim at a block to record a destination
message.corpse_campus.recorder_officer_r: The paper now contains a recorded destination
message.corpse_campus.recorder_officer_n: This paper does not contain a recorded destination yet
No valid target to attach the paper to
message.corpse_campus.recorder_officer_a: The recorded paper is attached to %s. Countdown: %s s
message.corpse_campus.midas_touch_no_tar: You need at least a held item or a targeted block to arm a bomb
message.corpse_campus.midas_touch_armed: Bombs armed. Countdown: %s s, blast level: %s
message.corpse_campus.midas_touch_no_man: Not enough mana. Arming this blast level requires %s mana
message.corpse_campus.midas_touch_invent: A bomb in your inventory detonated
message.corpse_campus.necrotic_rebirth_r: You clawed your way back and became undead
message.corpse_campus.necrotic_rebirth_k: You devoured life and restored %s health
message.corpse_campus.necrotic_rebirth_r: Your vitality has been fully restored; necrotic rebirth ends
message.corpse_campus.executioner_need_b: Executioner requires a usable blade in your main hand
message.corpse_campus.mark_placed: A mark has been etched onto the targeted block
screen.corpse_campus.dominance.title: Dominance Target
screen.corpse_campus.dominance.subtitle: Click a player to make every dominated mob focus them
screen.corpse_campus.midas_touch.title: Midas Broker
screen.corpse_campus.midas_touch.subtitl: Set the bomb countdown before arming your target
